evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 Dow Uap D33 Mission Report Greece October 2023 Dedasslfied by MG Richard A. Harrison USCENTCOM Chief of Staff Dedassified on· 22 January 2026 Misrep 9329374 Narrative l AT 2339ZJ 1.4a ITOOK OFF FROM LGLR. AT 235 z,~HANDED OVER FROM LRE.~PROCEEDED TO FRAGGED TASKING TO SUPPORT DATA MASKED. THE AT 0013Z,~WAS 7-LINED TO SUPPORT DATA MASKED 1.4a ED ON-STATION AT 03422, CHECKED IN WITH DATA MASKED, AND PERFO D FMV/SIGINT COLLECTION AT 401.4a!5g (SEE ISR 1 ). 36S YC AT 0035Z,[u;JOBSERVED lX POSS UAP (SEE UAP 1). AT 101 lZ[uia]RETURNED TO BASE. AT 1213Z,~HANpED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 1309Z, ~LANDED AT OJMS. FULL MOTION VIDEO WAS EXPLbITED BY GET. 13:30 MISSION HOURS, 06:29 FMV HOURS, IX FMV TASKINGS PROSECUT D.
